summary: TWO_COLUMN Burnside lemma for 2-color necklaces of length 6. 64 binary patterns → 14 orbits under cyclic rotation. LEFT: n=6 BLUE/ORANGE bead necklace via always_redraw with ValueTracker idx_tr cycling all 14 canonical representatives. RIGHT shows Σ_{d|n} φ(d)·k^(n/d)/n formula: (64+8+8+4)/6 = 14.
